top_signals.title: Trump says he likes idea of blaming Vance if Iran deal doesn't work out
top_signals.summary: President Trump at the G7 summit said the memorandum of understanding reached with Iran "might not be the kind of document that I should be signing."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
